description: The ContactsDialog component is used in the contacts screen of the Dash Menu to search, view, and talk to contacts.

fields._searchBar: The search bar to search for users.
fields._sessionsRoot: The slot where the list of sessions from the selected user will be.
fields._messagesRoot: The slot where the list of messages from the selected user will be.
fields._status: The image icon being used for the selected user's status.
fields._avatar: The image icon being used for the selected user's avatar image.
fields._username: The text for the selected user's username.
fields._userActionsRoot: The root slot to store buttons for performing actions on the selected user.
fields._sendMessageButton: The button for sending the currently typed message to the selected user.
fields._sendVoiceMessageButton: The button for sending a voice message to the currently selected user.
fields._sendMessageTextField: The text field to type messages to send to users.
fields._messagesScrollRect: The scroll rectangle component for the scroll area for messages to and from the selected user.
fields._inviteButton: Invite the selected user to the currently focused session if possible.
fields._requestInviteButton: Ask for an invite from the selected user.
fields._banAllButton: Ban the selected user from all sessions that the current local user will host.
fields._banSessionButton: Ban the selected user from the current focused session.
fields._unblockedButton: The button to unblock the currently selected user.
fields._avatarBlockButton: The button to block the currently selected user's avatar.
fields._mutualBlockButton: The button to do a mutual block with the currently selected user.

methods.SearchTextChanged: The action to run and pass a text editor as an argument when changing the search text.
methods.OnRemoveContact: The method to run when removing a contact.
methods.OnAddContact: The method to run when adding a contact.
methods.OnBanFromAll: The method to run when banning all on a contact.
methods.OnUnblock: The method to run when unblocking a contact.
methods.OnAvatarBlock: The method to run when blocking the avatar of a contact.
methods.OnMutualBlock: The method to run when mutual blocking a contact.
methods.OnBanFromCurrent: The method to run when banning a contact from the current session.
methods.OnIgnoreRequest: The method to run when ignoring a contact request.
methods.OnInviteContact: The method to run when inviting a contact.
methods.OnRequestInvite: The method to run when requesting a contact from a user.
methods.OnSendMessage: The method to run when sending a message to a user.
methods.OnStartRecordingVoiceMessage: The method to run when starting a voice message to send a message to a user.
methods.OnStopRecordingVoiceMessage: The method to run when sending a voice message to a user.
methods.MessageSubmitPressed: The method to run when submitting a message to a user.

usage: Not used by the user. Exists as the dash's Contacts tab.
